name: Evening Star
description: A gentle elody that feels like starlight falling through a window on a quiet evening. Warm, intimate, slightly melancholic — like someone whispering goodnight.

name: Pixel Love
description: A playful ringtone with bouncy energy. Fun, lighthearted, a bit nerdy — like a love letter written in code.

name: Midnight Waltz
description: A slow, elegant waltz played on cello and violin. It paints a scene of two silhouettes dancing alone in a moonlit ballroom. Romantic, mysterious, deeply emotional.

name: Velvet Noir
description: A smoky lo-fi jazz loop with lazy saxophone and vinyl crackle. It sounds like a late-night bar where someone nurses whiskey alone, unbothered by the world. Cool, effortless, dangerously charming.

name: Honey Morning
description: A bright acoustic ukulele paired with soft finger snaps and a hummed melody. It feels like waking up on a sunny weekend with nowhere to be — warm coffee, open windows, bare feet on wood floors.

name: Neon Pulse
description: A cinematic electronic ringtone with deep bass drops and glitchy synth arpeggios. It evokes neon-lit city streets at 2am — futuristic, confident, a little dangerous. For someone who walks like the world is their runway.
